title: Euphonic Sessions with Kyau & Albert - July 2024
description:
01 ORACLE & Holochrome - Coming Home [Monstercat Silk] [TRACK OF THE MONTH]
02 CRi - Dark In This Room [Anjunadeep]
03 Boss Axis - Shelter (Bunched Remix) [Euphonic Visions]
04 Sons Of Maria - Another Place [Sirup Music]	
05 Miss Monique & AVIRA ft LUNA - Subterranean [Armada]
06 Marsh - Floodlights [Anjunadeep]
07 Rules - Close My Eyes [D4 DANCE]
08 Rivo vs Armin van Buuren ft Sharon Den Adel - In And Out Of Love [Armada]
09 Kyau & Albert - Cascading Waterfalls [Euphonic]
10 Johan Gielen presents Airscape - Pacific Melody (Kryder's  Balearic Breaks Mix) [Black Hole]
11 Stoneface & Terminal - Don't Give A Fuck (2024 Rework) [Euphonic]
12 Sean Tyas & Enigma State - Lately [I Like It Pure]
13 Andrew Bayer & Oliver Smith - Rude Boyz [Anjunabeats]
14 The Chemical Brothers- Hey Boy Hey Girl (ARTBAT Remix) [Positiva]
15 Genix & Everyone You Know - Dream Of You ( Clean Mix) [Anjunabeats]
16 Mijk Van Dijk presents Microglobe - High On Hope (1992's Long Hot Summer Mix) [MFS] [CLASSIC OF THE MONTH]
17 Masters & Nickson ft Justine Suissa - Out There (UUFO Remix) [Armada Captivating]
18 Hansgod - Everynight [Hooj Choons]
19 JXR - Mai Tai [Elliptical Sun]
20 GAO x Low Contrast - Earth [Elliptical Sun]
21 Tritonal & Kuala - From The Inside [Enhanced]
22 Yulia Niko, Moullinex ft A Sul - Sand (Moullinex Remix) [Armada]
23 Steven Weston ft Ormella - Give Me Something [Anjunadeep]
24 Miss Melera - Sage [DAYS like NIGHTS]
25 Digital Drift - Nebula [SNRS]
26 Ferry Corsten & Marsh - Fulfillment [Flashover]
27 Nora En Pure - Pretoria [Sirup Music]
28 Jag Limbo - They Had Everything [Hooj Choons]
